articles.title: Mali attacks: Russia's Africa Corps confirms withdrawal from Kidal - BBC
articles.description: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.
articles.content: Fighting resumed in Kidal on Sunday, but shortly afterwards, FLA spokesman Mohamed Elmaouloud Ramadane said an agreement had been reached between them and the Russian Africa Corps with a "a view to e… [+50 chars]
